heading: Shore patrol duty; payment of expenses
label: 2762 Shore patrol duty; payment of expenses
text: An officer or cadet of the Coast Guard who is assigned shore patrol duty away from his vessel or other duty station may be paid his actual expenses.
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 510 of this title
amendments: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 510 of this title
